My case is being handled by Guillermo, and I've left a message on his voicemail, but I haven't received a response either.

reviews.text:
We recently had the pleasure of working with Jim Nosich and his amazing team, and I can confidently say that they exceeded our expectations in every way. From the very beginning, we were struck by their kindness, empathy, and willingness to listen to our concerns.

Jim himself was an absolute pleasure to work with. He took the time to get to know our family and their situation, and he always made us feel like we were his top priority. He was incredibly knowledgeable about malpractice law, and he helped us understand the complexities of the case in a way that was clear and easy to understand.

But Jim's greatness doesn't stop there. His team is simply wonderful. Sharon, in particular, brought such positive energy to every interaction we had. Her high positive vibes were infectious, and she always made us feel like everything was going to be okay.

And Sonia, the paralegal, was JUST amazing. Her loving kindness and motherly touch were exactly what we needed during such a difficult time. She was always there to answer our questions and provide reassurance when we needed it most.

But perhaps the thing I appreciated most about Jim and his team was their clear communication. They were always available to talk, and they never left us wondering about the status of the case. They truly made the entire process so easy to deal with, and their empathy and understanding of our situation made all the difference.

Overall, Jim Nosich and his team were an absolute pleasure to work with. Despite dealing with a horrible situation, they made the family feel supported and understood every step of the way. Their empathy, kindness, and problem-solving skills are unmatched, and I would highly recommend them to anyone in need of a malpractice attorney. Thank you, Jim, Sharon, Sonia, and the entire team, for your wonderful work
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your review about your experience working with Nosich & Ganz. We are thrilled to hear that they exceeded your expectations in every way. Jim and his team are dedicated to providing their clients with the best possible service, and we are pleased to hear that they were able to do so for you.

We appreciate your kind words about their kindness, empathy, and clear communication. It is our goal to provide our clients with the support and understanding they need during difficult times, and we are glad to hear that Jim, Sharon, Sonia, and the entire team were able to do that for you.

Thank you for choosing Nosich & Ganz to represent you in your malpractice case. We are grateful for your trust and confidence in our firm.

A normal trip to my local ER resulted in an astronomical medical bill. I hired Adam Santana of Nosich & Ganz to help me navigate the frustrating maze of insurance companies and billing involved in my situation.

Cordial, thorough, and knowledgeable (not to mention an all around nice guy), Adam was a steady guide through an intense process. Lawyers often get a bad wrap. But Adam is absolutely the type of attorney you want to represent your interests!
Too grateful to attorney Santana, one of the best attorneys you can count on, great service.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Good afternoon Ms. Teresa Gual:
As per our conversation this Sunday morning, September 8, within an hour of you leaving this review, I am sorry you did not receive a legal service you requested from my law office.

Although leaving a one-star review is your choice, your review is ostensibly not reflective of any client services received at this office, only the alleged lack thereof. Additionally, there is only a record of you contacting my office twice and it was within hours of each other back in August.

Regardless, I am glad you had your legal issue resolved.

As you are aware, you now have my direct number (bypassing the answering service) should you need to reach me directly in the future.

Jorge Abreu, Esq.

reviews.text:
I had the worst experience here. They hid crucial evidence in my case. They made me sign documents I didn't want to, they're abusive with payments, and the treatment is the worst. This company ruined my case and then abandoned it. I don't recommend them. You can't imagine the immense frustration of knowing that the lawyers I trusted only received a large sum of money for doing nothing. If you believe my accusations could be defamatory, we can resolve it in court. I'm available to receive any notification regarding the alleged defamation. Even among the assets in the other party's possession, their lawyers accepted that I owned a Corvette valued at $5,000. I've never seen a Corvette valued at that amount, not even at auction. They are a fraud, and my evidence was hidden and not given to me until the case was supposedly over. They abandoned the case due to lack of payment on a Friday afternoon, even though the final hearing was the following Monday. There was no way to find a lawyer between Saturday and Sunday. I attended the hearing under the effects of medication in the hospital because of the panic attack I suffered from being left without support. They didn't notice the lack of payment on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, or even Friday morning. They intentionally abandoned the case in the afternoon. Please, I have enough evidence to prove that the case was lost due to their poor work.

Furthermore, not only did they force me to sign documents without explanation, but now they are threatening me to remove the post under the pretext of defamation. Things are going very well for us in court.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are deeply sorry to read about your experience and appreciate you sharing your concerns, although your allegations are completely false. At our firm, we strive to maintain transparency and integrity in all our cases, and we consider our clients' feedback with the utmost seriousness.

We would like to clarify some important points without disclosing specific details for confidentiality reasons. You retained our services in November 2021 for your divorce proceedings. During our time representing you, we worked diligently on your case, including filing all necessary documents in accordance with court deadlines. In July 2022, with your signed consent, we ceased representing you due to difficulties in continuing payments for our services.

It is important to note that the accusations in your review are serious and defamatory. We assure you that at no time did we force anyone to sign documents without their consent or withhold evidence; this is entirely false.

Since your review, we have been monitoring the progress of your case and understand your frustration that, three years later and with alternative legal representation, you still haven't reached a settlement. However, defaming the person who tried to help you three years ago is not the right approach.

We wish you the best of luck with your case.

reviews.text: Thanks to the lawyers and staff at Gallardo. A very satisfied client; a very good experience with you.

reviews.text:
For the last decade the Law Offices of Anthony C. Vitale have been an indispensable partner to my healthcare business - offering unrivaled counsel, guidance, and education in healthcare regulatory compliance. Their commitment to ensuring operational excellence and adherence to best practices in regulatory matters is unparalleled, setting a benchmark for excellence in the field.

A highlight of the collaboration has been the opportunity to work closely with Chris Parrela, a national leader in healthcare regulatory compliance. His adeptness at navigating the complex interplay between regulatory statutes and practical operations has been instrumental in fostering a compliant and efficient working environment. This unique capability has not only enhanced operational compliance but also set a foundation for success in dealings with third-party payers.

Moreover, Chris's proficiency in facilitating clear and transparent communication with these payers has led to mutually beneficial outcomes for all parties involved, further solidifying the firm's reputation for efficacy and efficiency in the healthcare legal landscape.

Under the guidance of Chris Parrela and the team at the Law Offices of Anthony C. Vitale, there's a palpable commitment to putting patient care at the forefront of their work. This ethos is a constant thread in their approach and a significant reason for the continued partnership. The firm's dedication to navigating the complexities of healthcare law with integrity, expertise, and a patient-first perspective is commendable, making them a highly recommended choice for anyone in the healthcare sector in need of legal services that truly understand the unique challenges and intricacies of healthcare law.

reviews.text:
I had a terrible accident when I tripped over a wire left across the floor in a big box store. It was all caught on video, but I still ended up needing knee surgery. I felt overwhelmed, but I remembered Brian from high school and knew he was a personal injury attorney. Calling him was the best decision I could have made.

Brian and David Chonin treated me with compassion and respect from the very first call. They made sure I saw the best doctors, guided me through every step, and fought tirelessly for me. My case almost went all the way to trial, but they negotiated an amazing settlement that truly changed my life.

What stood out most was not just their hard work, but how kind and thorough they were throughout the process. They’re not “billboard lawyers” — they’re real people who care deeply about their clients and fight all the way, no matter how tough the case. If you need attorneys who will treat you like family and stand up for you, I can’t recommend the Law Offices of Brian Breiter enough.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ivette thank you so much for the kind words. It was an honor and a pleasure to represent you. David and I fought really hard and made sure that we got you the best possible result under the circumstances.  Thank you for being such a great client and friend

reviews.text:
The Best Legal Representation!!!

I cannot thank the Law Offices of Brian Breiter enough, especially David Chonin, for the incredible support and legal expertise they provided during one of the most traumatic times in my life. I was viciously attacked by four pit bulls while walking in Miami—a horrifying experience that left me physically and emotionally scarred.

From the very beginning, David Chonin was not only a fierce advocate but also a compassionate and steady presence throughout the entire process. He took the time to explain every step, always kept me informed, and made sure I felt supported at all times. His communication was impeccable—he was always available, responsive, and genuinely cared about my recovery and my rights.

Thanks to David’s determination and legal skill, he was able to recover every bit of insurance coverage available to me. He fought tirelessly on my behalf and ensured I received the justice and compensation I deserved.

If you ever find yourself in need of a personal injury attorney, I definitely recommend David Chonin and the entire team at the Law Offices of Brian Breiter. Their dedication, professionalism, and humanity truly set them apart.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nathalee I know it’s been a while since your father’s passing. And I’m sure you must feel the loss even to this day like it was yesterday. It was such an honor to represent you and your sister in this very important place and I’m glad we were able to resolve it for you to your satisfaction. Please stay in touch.

reviews.text:
Life-Changing Representation After My Motorcycle Accident

I can’t say enough good things about attorneys David Chonin and Brian Breiter. I was riding my motorcycle on Alton Road in Miami Beach on my way to work when a Bobcat tractor suddenly turned into me, leaving me with a broken leg and a long road to recovery. It was a terrifying, painful experience but David and Brian made sure I never faced it alone.

David Chonin came to the hospital to meet me personally something I’ll never forget. From that first moment, I knew I was in the hands of people who genuinely cared. Throughout the entire legal process, David was always available to answer my questions, no matter how small or complex. He kept me informed, reassured, and focused when things felt overwhelming.

I chose the Law Offices of Brian Breiter because they are experienced trial lawyers that are not afraid to try cases. The insurance companies know this. Brian and David worked tirelessly on my case, preparing the case for trial. On the eve of trial, they secured a settlement far beyond what I ever expected. Their dedication, legal expertise, and strategic approach made all the difference.

If you’re injured and don’t know where to turn, I wholeheartedly recommend this team. They’re not just great lawyers they’re compassionate advocates who will fight for you like family.

Thank you, David and Brian, for everything.
reviews.ownerResponse: Eduardo, thank you so much for the very kind review. David and I are so happy that we were able to get such a great settlement for you. Despite everything that happened to you, I believe that the result was fair under the circumstances. Thank you for trusting us and letting us go all the way. Stay in touch.

reviews.text: Identity theft is not an easy road to navigate, especially when it happens the first time. After the initial shock if not bewilderment on how such a thing could happen, I called the offices of Brian Breiter since I have known him since he was a star debater in my class years ago. In less than an hour, Mr. Breiter had the issue completely solved with no negative repercussions at all. This did not surprise me; but you can imagine my relief. Kudos to Mr. Breiter and his efficient staff!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the very kind words. We appreciate your support and are always here for you if you need us in the future.

reviews.text: After being side swiped off of the road by a cement truck, I decided to contact Brian Breiter, LLP. His warm and courteous demeanor was just what I needed in a time like this!! He, along with his South Florida partner, David Chonin, were remarkably professional and knowledgeable throughout the process. They kept me informed of things as they arose and they were always available!! We did not end up going to court, but instead was able to get it settled in mediation. This process was seamless and we ended up with WAY more than either of us expected! Best call I could’ve made! I highly recommend their services! Ten out of ten ⭐️’s!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Lori, thank you so much for the kind words. You were an amazing client and it was a pleasure representing you. Please reach out to us anytime you know we are always here for you.

Thank you David and Brian for your diligence and resilience in fighting for our family. The insurance company wanted to give us less but our attorneys stood their ground in the number that was fair for our family’s loss. We ended up receiving a fair amount due to these attorneys.
reviews.ownerResponse: Miss White thank you so much for the kind words. This was such an honor to represent you and your sister for the tragic loss of your family member. I hope all is well and we are always thinking about you.

reviews.text: Where to begin. What a journey it has been for our family’s wrongful death case. I can confidently say, to have David and Brian as our trial attorneys was a blessing. These men were emotionally supportive as well informative.  With their knowledge, we were able to ask those uncertain questions and always get a timely response. Our family never felt like we were kept out of the loop with what was going on during the duration of our case. Our case did go to trial where the insurance company wasn’t offering a fair amount, until these sharks in the courtroom demanded it with fair reasoning. They fought for what is fair without wavering and kept such a strong stance. If you want to be put in trusted hands especially during such a vulnerable time, they are attorneys that will fight for justice in your case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nicole it was an honor representing your family along with David Chonin. Your father was a great and loving man. I am glad we were able to get Justice for him in the courtroom. May his memory be a blessing to all that knew him.

reviews.text: Brian Breiter's reputation as a top-rated personal injury attorney is well-deserved and anyone looking for an attorney who knows how to effectively fight for them should look no further than Brian Breiter.
reviews.ownerResponse: Robert, thank you for the kind words. We appreciate them.
Gracias

reviews.text:
A couple of years ago it was a beautiful day in Los Angeles and I was driving to the airport, next thing I know I’m in a horrible accident and my life is turned upside down. I’ve never been in a crash like this before, and I knew it was serious. It was obvious I was going to need legal help so I started searching online and asking friends. After doing tons of research I narrowed my search down to two law firms, the Law Offices of Brian Breiter and Movagar and Yamin.

I met with both firms and was impressed with each of them. When I interviewed them, I asked what their opinions were of the other firm, and they both said the same thing, great lawyers you can’t go wrong. I found out after talking with Brian Breiter that Nick Movagar used to work with him and that they often work on cases together. At that point Brian suggested that both firms could work together on the case, and that’s exactly what happened. I thought how can I lose, I get two lawyers for the price of one. Nick was amazing at helping me get access to the best doctors. I ended up needing a serious back surgery, and he found one of the best spine surgeons in Los Angeles.

The recovery was hard, but Brian and Nick made it easy. After the surgery they both arranged to have a nurse take care of me at home so I wouldn’t be alone. Nick arranged for a great physical therapy and after care.

Because the injuries were so serious and my medical bills were high the case had to go into litigation. Nicks firm handled the initial part of the case. When it became obvious that the insurance company was not going to pay what I deserved, Brain took over and prepared the case for the trial.

I felt in great hands with both firms. Nick and Brian made themselves available to me anytime. I had questions, a lot, and would sometimes text them on the weekends or in the middle of the night and they were always there to reassure me. The time came for the trial, but just before that the defense probably got scared and agreed to go to mediation. It was a long hard negotiation and Brian was there the whole way. He was a great negotiator, and we were able to settle the case for a fantastic and very fair outcome.

At the end of the case, Nick was amazing, he made sure that my medical bills, which were very high because I did not have insurance, were reduced so that I was left with a large part of the settlement. I really appreciated how hard he fought for me. It was a hard choice choosing between these two great attorneys, so I chose them both. I was lucky they agreed to work together, they make a great team. Thank you guys for taking such good care of me! 5 star service.

I was hit by a car walking in a crosswalk in Beverly Hills, CA. It happened almost 2 years ago. Engaging Brian and his team shortly thereafter was one of my best decisions ever.

His knowledge, and confidence told me I was working with the best professionals I could have found.

Brian's guidance was invaluable. He listened and helped me throughout the case. We were both patient and that patience produced positive results.

Give Brian a call immediately when the need for a great lawyer comes up in your life!

Brian has been a fantastic attorney. He's smart, friendly, and he gets results.  I took a nasty fall in a theater. When my previous attorney advised me that he felt my case was not worth pursuing, Brian took it and netted me a substantial settlement.  I have been in several unfortunate car accidents - I live in Los angeles, which is like a giant bumper car game - and he has, each time, helped me negotiate the sometimes excruciating gauntlet of insurance company obstacles.  Brian is professional, expert, personable, and a tiger in negotiation. I will use him again

When I was first looking for help with my bike accident I really couldn't believe that a lawyer could have 100% 5 star reviews.

But now I understand why. Brian and his team genuinely car for every single one of their clients.

At every step of the process of resolving the claim for my accident Brian and his team have been incredible - from making sure I got proper treatment, through talking me through the claim process and what to expect, through the multiple stages of the claim they have always been there and always been friendly and professional. My calls are always returned. My emails answered.

I can not thank them enough.

If you are unfortunate enough to be involved in an accident call Brian first.

My daughter was only 11 years old when her father was involved in a motorcycle accident with a vehicle belonging to the City of Los Angeles. David remained in a coma for over six months and died on my daughter's birthday from Traumatic Brain Injury.
The evening of the accident, my brother gave me a number of an attorney he had heard about and told me to call immediately. I'm so glad I called that same night. Overwhelmed and numb, I talked with Brian for hours on the phone, still in shock, explaining what had happened to David that morning and the delicate situation involving my daughter.
Brian listened attentively and was able to comfort and advise me. This was what he would consistently do for me for the next two years. Brian was always available, considerate, trustworthy, professional, and compassionate. He immediately arranged for conservatorship, medical assistance, and the myriad of legal procedures that would involve a complicated wrongful death case against the City of Los Angeles. Brian was always kind to my daughter as well as sensitive to the impact she would go through from having her father in a coma and ultimately his death. Brian and Mark were always professional and available when answering my never ending questions or clarifying the legal process.
It's important for me to say that Brian changed our lives when everything went dark. He gently guided us for two years through this experience. The case was settled and we found resolution. My daughter and I can now continue the process to heal from our devastating loss with resilience and strength.
When you work with Brian and his tireless team, you will understand why people say he is truly the best of the best. My daughter and I are both forever grateful to work with Brian. He continues to be there for us.

BREIT, BREITER, BREITEST
Finding Brian Breiter was like finding that pot of gold at the end of the rainbow. He is an L.A. treasure in the world of litigation and personal injury. All of the reviews contained on this page are 100% right on and accurate and express all of my same sentiments. If I were to elaborate, I would only be "gushing", however, that is exactly what I would like to do. If you find yourself in that awful predicament of being in an auto collision (I use that description rather than "accident"), call Brian..asap. This guy is cool, calm, collected, caring, cohesive, and oh so focused! He slam-dunked my case is 3 months.
About my case: the day after my birthday on Aug. 16th I made a completely legal, clean left turn, when this woman ran a red light and slammed into me so hard, she t-boned my car and made me spin out onto the sidewalk. Yep, my car was totaled. I had another attorney who didn't work out, and then I found Brian Breiter..the "man". I called him in October and met with him at his office around the middle of Oct.
Fast forward to January 22, 2014, when Brian called to tell me that everything was settled and to drop by his office to pick up my check! All those doctor visits and physical therapy and aches and pains had been taken care of and now I had my settlement. I don't ever want to go through such an ordeal again, but if I do, the first call I make will be to Brian J. Breiter..The Breitest star on Wilshire Blvd.

And let me strongly adivse anyone out there who has a similar unfortunate incident occur, don't hesitate, don't wait, pick up the phone and call BRIAN J. BREITER!!! Just do it..you will be happy you did.

I have nothing but great things to say about Mark, Brian, and the rest of the team. They know exactly what they are doing, were incredibly professional, and most of all, they cared. I didn't have to bug them or even communicate much because they were upfront about the timeline  and I knew they were taking care of things.

I was involved in an accident with an out of state driver that resulted in me tearing my ACL and needing 2 different surgeries to fix it. He ran a stop sign and just didn't see me. After the first conversation with their insurance adjustor to be paid out for the total loss of my car, I knew it was going to be a pain dealing with them because they were bickering over the $100 or so that I wanted to replace my tinted windows. I started to imagine what it would be like dealing with them over the phone with 10s or 100s of thousands of dollars on the line.

That's when I hired Mark and Brian to handle everything and that they did. I was rest assured knowing that the insurance company would respect that and their firm as they bring wrongful death cases to trail. Knowing that allowed me to focus 100% on the recovery and rehab. It took over 3.5 years for everything to settle and I'm confident in saying that they helped me receive quite a far larger settlement than I believe I would have been able to get on my own or elsewhere.

They are the real deal. I feel privileged that they were able to work with me. They aren't some massive shop that just takes every case they can.  They were responsive, strategic, smart, upfront,  and not once did I feel like just another number. They cared about my health and treated me as a friend the entire way through. They don't take everyone, but If they say they'll bring you on as a client, I'd absolutely recommend it ASAP.

On October 27, 2015 my brother was killed in a tragic accident.  He was riding his bike home from the beach.  A semi with a shipping container was traveling the same way as he was, he was going under a bridge at  the same time as the semi with the shipping container. As the semi made its  way under the bridge the load was too high, the shipping container clipped the top of the bridge and fell onto my brother as he was riding his bike and killed him instantly.  My brother was my everything, he was the only one left out of my immediate family.  I’ll never forget the night, the coroner came to my house as soon as he introduced himself as the coroner I knew that my brother was dead.  I remember all my family coming over that night and the next morning there was all different news vans sitting in front of my house channel 7 channel 9 channel 4.etc...  they were pounding on my door at 7:30 8 o’clock in the morning, I never once gave the news a statement, I was too distraught so my cousins would always tell them to go away.  Then I had a lot of lawyers waiting in front of my house because they wanted my business, I also had a couple of shady characters trying to get me to hire them to represent my brothers case, when I say shady I mean they were trying to do anything and everything to get me to hire them. At this point I did not know what to do so I started researching lawyers and Brian’s name came up.  His name came up actually several times with 100% success rate.  I finally met with Brian and my family was telling me that I should meet with at least three more lawyers to get a second and third opinion.  At this time I really didn’t feel like meeting with different lawyers I just didn’t have the energy I felt so drained from everything.  After I met with Brian my cousins and I went to go have some Pho, and on the fortune cookie that I got it said your first choice will be the wisest  to follow at this time.  After that fortune cookie I knew that Brian was my first choice and he was the wisest choice.  So I highly recommend Brian he’s one of the best trial lawyers around or to me is the best!  2 1/2 years later it was bittersweet but my brothers case was finally settled and Brian did an amazing job even though there’s no amount of money that can bring my brother back, Brian made sure that I got the max amount.  Thank you Brian Brieter you’re the best!

Brian Breiter, Thank you and your team for all your efforts. Thank you for making the painful and stressful process very relieving. Two years ago when I told a few friends that my lawyer was "Super Lawyer, Brian Breiter ", they told me, ahh you'll never even get him on the phone. Well every time I called, you picked up. So that is much appreciated. And Congratulations on the opening of the new office in Miami.
PS I still want a rematch at Backgammon.

Brian Breiter is an awesome lawyer and a really great guy. I was a pedestrian crushed between two cars and suffered a severe injury. I called Brian up, and he came to see me in the hospital shortly after I had my accident. I was hurt really bad and he assured me that in time I'd be ok. He explained the process of my case to me, and answered any questions that I had. He was really there for my recovery.  He got the case settled in a timely manner. And when it was all said and done I got a good deal money. I greatly appreciate all the hard work that he a n his team did and I'd recommend if you need a great attorney to hire Brian Breiter.

Many years ago, when Brian Brieter was in Law School, a mutual acquaintance of ours commented that Brian was going to be a great Lawyer. The person making the comment was a prominent member of our community who knew lawyers. I saw the person making the comment recently and reminded him of what he had said about Brian back in the day. We both are really impressed about Brian's very successful law career and the legions of people he had helped over the years.
Every time I need a lawyer I ask Brian what he thinks and he very carefully takes the time to listen and advise me. It impresses me that very often he has advised me for free. In addition, He has referred me to other lawyers because it was away from his area of expertise.
Brian very clearly lays out a road map and strategy with different alternatives,  makes sure to put you at ease and assure you that things will be alright.
Brian is tenacious, bright, thoughtful and a great communicator. He has an uncanny ability to keep things light with his sense of humor yet he is very serious about achieving his clients goals!
I am not easily impressed, but I highly recommend Brian Brieter to anyone needing legal advice!

I have worked closely with Brian and his fellow lawyers. They do amazing work and have helped my patients get compensated for their injuries. I take emergency room call and have many trauma patients who ask for a referral to a lawyer to help them. I work with many lawyers because of my work at level 1 trauma centers, and they are by far the best. Patient reported settlement and jury awarded results that are significantly higher. Recently, I also had a patient get injured and had a grossly disfigured nose. Her insurance denied her treatment at the time of her injury, wanted her to follow up and get treatment at the insurance facility. They guaranteed that she would be expeditiously seen and treated. She was discharged from the emergency room and called her insurance right away. They told her that they wouldn't be able to see her for a week. She contacted Brian Breiter, he referred her to me without knowing that I had seen her the day before, and arranged to have her surgery with me to fix her broken nose the next day. Brian and his fellow lawyers are talented, and take care of their clients by arranging for both the best medical care and getting them the maximum monetary compensation possible. I would not go to anyone else if I were injured and was looking for a good lawyer.

I was driving on my way to work last June when a ride sharing service car cut me off trying to make a right turn from the middle lane, struck my car and ultimately ending up pushing me into another vehicle. My car  was deemed totaled and I was at a loss at what steps to take next. After a recommendation from a coworker to pursue legal action I was introduced to Brian.

From our very first meeting I was treated with nothing but kindness and respect. I had never been in an accident before and really felt quite helpless. I was deemed "ok" by the medics when they arrived but was still in severe pain after the accident. It was only because of Brian's recommendation that I got an MRI- turns out I had several herniated discs in my lower back!

Brian and his whole team took care of setting me up with the best orthopedic, PT team, and massage therapist. They truly were focused on me getting better and always checked in throughout the whole process anytime I had a question or concern. Whether it be by email, phone, or even texting on Brians personal cell they were always available to me.

When I first met with Brian he was confident that he would win my case and gave me an idea of what my settlement amount could be. Well not only did he WIN but he more than doubled the initial amount AND was able to reduce ALL of my medical bills.

This whole process (minus the accident) was a breeze! Brian will forever be my personal injury lawyer and I would highly recommend his services to anyone!

In October of 2013, I was crossing the street near my own home in LA when I was hit by an SUV.

Nothing can prepare you for something like that. The is no step by step guide for what to do next.

All I knew is I needed help. I needed someone to help me go through this as the car that hit me did not call for help and did not report what happened. The driver also did not give me any information other than a name and phone number which went straight to voicemail every time I tried calling.

I was clearly hurt, I was limping and falling and since no one arrived at the scene when I was hurt, I was basically advocating for myself, which I found out, is VERY difficult to do after such a traumatic event.

Before I found Brian and Marc, I found myself being sent home from the er  hospital and doctor multiple times with a pat on the back, letting me know it is painful to get by a car but I would feel better soon since I am younger than 40.

This dance lasted until my own health insurance had enough complaints to referred me to an orthopedic doctor. I finally got an appointment to see the orthopedic doctor a week after thanksgiving. The moment the orthopedic doctor laid eyes on me, he inquired why no one was helping me go through this.

I didn't even realize what I was going through was wrong. I didn't even realize I needed help.

My orthopedic doctor let me know I needed 3 MRIs. The sooner the better.

Unfortunately, since I was going through my own insurance, the doctor informed me I could receive the referrals for MRIs maybe by January of the following year. I bursted into tears in the orthopedic doctor's office. I already wasn't sleeping because of the pain. My body was no longer my own. No one seemed to care.

I knew I needed help. That evening, in my desperation, I turned to Yelp after googling for the best lawyer in LA.

When I found Brian Breiter's page, every review I read was truthful and positive. The more reviews I read, the more it became clear: this was a team who cared.

I figured that my situation couldn't get any worse that what happened that day in the orthopedic doctor's office. I took a chance and I called them.

I am so glad I did. Although I was scared, hurt, confused, unsure of what to do, they believed me and were willing to meet with me.

I walked into Brian's office, limping with 2 young children in tow. The minute I saw Brian and Marc, they believed me and were willing to represent me.

15 minutes later, I was sent in an uber to a doctor and I got immediate care. It turned out I had real issues with my neck, back, my arms and my left leg. I had definitely needed more than just home care.

By that evening, a plan to care for my injuries and to recover from them was set in motion.

For the next FOUR YEARS, we talked about my care every step of the way. Anytime I called, anyone I spoke to knew who I was. Every time I called, the call always ended with "Don't worry about anything. Focus on getting better" and Brian absolutely delivered.  I finally got the medical care I had desperately needed.

Brian and Marc saw me for what I was: a young wife and mother of 2 young children whose lives have changed from this accident. The compassion and understanding is something that definitely made a difference to my family and I.

Although nothing in the world can ever fix the pain I have or replace the time I lost as I continuing to recover from this accident, Brian and Marc made sure justice was delivered to my family and I.

There are not enough words to express how grateful I am to have found a lawyer like Brian. My family and I whole lives are much better because Brian is willing to be someone who fights for what's fair. Thank you Brian and Marc!

Brian is a great lawyer. A few years ago I was on my way to standup gig a benefit for the AA club in Orange. While en route through Cypress I was a victim of a hit and run drunk driver, the irony is not lost on me.
My car was totaled and I was left unconscious, injured and in need of medical attention. After I was released from the hospital I immediately called Brian. Brian took a horrifically traumatic moment in my life and made it a lot easier. He managed the insurance, hospital and ambulance phone calls and worked diligently to resolve my case fast. Since then, whenever anyone is in need of a personal injury attorney I don't hesitate to refer them to Brain, simply because he's the best and gets results. I hope no one has to go through what I went through, but if you do leave it up to Brian he's a professional.

Thank you Brian Breiter. Thank you for your concern. For your personal care. For your attentiveness. For your expertise. Thank you for making a terribly unfortunate incident in my life less terrible. I was bitten in the face by a Bull Mastiff. For those of you who do not know what that is it's a very large dog. He took a chunk right out of my face. I bled horribly and was rushed to the ER where I received well over 100 stitches in my face. I was referred to Mr Breiter and his team by a longtime friend who I deem trustworthy and knowledgable. After arranging what seemed to be almost an immediate meeting the day after the incident Brian formulated a precision game plan, recommended an evaluation of my face by a top plastic surgeon, and also asked if I thought I might need any kind of therapy to assist me in what could possibly be a fear of dogs in the future. He coached me well for the deposition. He went head to head with the heartless insurance company representing the dog's owner who was careless. Brian fought hard for me. I remember being so impressed by the amount of respect he commanded for the defendant's lawyer. Brian has swagger. He's got style. He's got the know-how to get the job done. He did not rest until all of my bills were paid and I walked away with a very nice settlement. I definitely have a scar to show for it but as they say, when life gives you lemons, call Brian Breiter. I'd give 100 stars if I could. Seriously.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jason, you are one of the bravest clients I’ve ever had. You also have the best attitude for someone who went through such a horrible ordeal. You are very lucky that the surgeons were able to do such a good job, and that you still are devastatingly handsome! You have become a great friend throughout this process and I treasure our relationship.

When I returned the calls of the specialist who left me a message,  the person answering the phone asked many questions which were already answered with the intake specialist. I had a truly terrible experience with Carlos Gomez and his law office. First and foremost, his incompetence is glaring. I made mistake after mistake, dragging my case along with errors that could have easily been avoided.

To make matters worse, he was impossible to reach, and his lack of communication left me feeling entirely in the dark throughout the investigation. When I needed guidance for depositions, he failed to prepare me adequately, only to pressure me to settle for far less than my case was worth, which I refused to accept.

It's clear that he prioritizes convenience for himself over the well-being of his clients.

But the worst part? He deliberately waited until the statute of limitations was nearly up to pressure me into a settlement offer that only benefited him. Carlos Gomez blatantly avoids going to trial because he knows he's unprepared to defend his clients in front of a jury. It's as if he only deals with small cases where clients are willing to accept any convenient settlement offer.

Moreover, Carlos Gomez and his team displayed an appalling level of rudeness and disrespect. Their incompetence is matched only by their lack of professionalism. It's abundantly clear that their primary concern is their own financial gain, not the best interests of their clients.

Do yourself a favor and stay far away from Carlos Gomez and his office. Do your research and avoid retaining these charlatans at all costs.

Long review:
My case started smoothly with high promises that I should be able to get the full compensation based on the damages and the pain I was going through. The first case manager that was assigned to my case handled it very poorly. After a couple of month I decide it to have another case manager handle my case to see If I was able to get better assistance from them. They assigned Jennifer Mendez. At the beginning she was friendly and helpful but then when I needed her she was never available so it was always me dealing with the insurance company. After a while once again, I had to complain but this time I asked to work with the attorney, which gave me more reassurance that my case was doing fine and that everything was in place. During the closing statements which is really where you find out how much you going to be getting because again none of these people would give you any reassurance about anything not sure what kinds of lawyers are they  because if you hire a lawyer is to have reassurance otherwise I would done this myself and pocket the money I had to pay them. Anyways when I find out how much money I was going to get I range to the attorney about how I felt with her case managers (assistants) which she reply very unprofessional and this is my only complain about the attorney because she was helpful unlike the case managers (assistants) that all I got from them was bad information, lack of knowledge, etc. so I was trying to communicate that to her. She said that I was being disrespectful when the disrespect comes directly from them because the money I got is almost equal to the same amount money they got for my case. I guess she was expecting me to be happy after everything.

reviews.text: It's been a while, but I was surprised to see the reviews are good. I had contacted them because of reviews and after being "sold" the package of what he would do (Shuster), he dropped the ball big time. I ended up paying $3500 to him plus $1000 to bank -back then, to avoid foreclosure and sign over my property, so it wouldn't go on my credit report for all those years- AND it still ended up as a foreclosure!! I tried to contact office and email several times. His assistant told me he had more important properties to worry about. I was shocked to hear that. Not because I thought I was important; I simply though I would get what I paid for. He was rude as well and after he was paid suddenly had no time. I only wish I didn't waste $4500 just to live with years of a foreclosure on my report. I really hope the other reviews are true and people aren't getting hurt like me, but if not then I want to put a warning out there for any innocent - not rich- folks like me.

She consistently advocated for me and made sure my best interests were always the priority. One thing that really stood out was the time and effort she put into reducing my medical bills. She worked hard behind the scenes to negotiate them down substantially, which made a huge difference in my final outcome. That level of dedication and attention to detail is something that really matters in cases like this.

What I appreciated most was how supported I felt the entire time. Legal cases can be stressful and overwhelming, especially when they take as long as mine did, but Carolina and her team made the process feel manageable. They were patient, responsive, and always willing to guide me through every step.

I truly trust Carolina and her team and have the utmost confidence in them. If you’re trying to decide where to go or who you should trust to protect and guide you through a case like this, she is absolutely the person you want on your side.

But Joe and his amazing PA were my anchor in that storm. They not only provided expert legal counsel but also offered me a sense of protection and guidance when I needed it most. They listened with empathy, responded with clarity, and fought with integrity. More than anything, they made sure that the truth of who I am as a devoted and capable mother  was clearly seen and heard in court.

I was accused of a crime I did not commit.  A 1st degree felony with a maximum sentence of 30yrs!  I always kinda thought that this charge would somehow go away but it never did.  It only got more and more serious as time went on.  Literally, no-one wanted to hear my story until I met Attorney Lett.  He not only believed that I should not of been charged with a 1st degree felony, he actually began to build a coherent strategy to fight it.  On the day of trial, the prosecutor was still committed to prosecute my case and send me to prison for a long time.  Attorney Lett kept his cool and kept going forward with his strategy to intelligently show the jury that I was not guilty.  After the jury was paneled and after our opening statements, the next day, the prosecutor agreed to lower my charge to a misdemeanor, adjudication withheld, with 1 year probation suspended after 6 months!  Needless to say, everyones jaw dropped including the judge as I went from a 1st degree felony facing 30 years to a simple misdemeanor.  I would encourage anyone who is up very serious charges and want an honest answer and a listening ear to call Ariel Lett.  You will not be disappointed Im sure.

reviews.text:
I had the worst experience here. They hid crucial evidence in my case. They made me sign documents I didn't want to, they're abusive with payments, and the treatment is the worst. This company ruined my case and then abandoned it. I don't recommend them. You can't imagine the immense frustration of knowing that the lawyers I trusted only received a large sum of money for doing nothing. If you believe my accusations could be defamatory, we can resolve it in court. I'm available to receive any notification regarding the alleged defamation. Even among the assets in the other party's possession, their lawyers accepted that I owned a Corvette valued at $5,000. I've never seen a Corvette valued at that amount, not even at auction. They are a fraud, and my evidence was hidden and not given to me until the case was supposedly over. They abandoned the case due to lack of payment on a Friday afternoon, even though the final hearing was the following Monday. There was no way to find a lawyer between Saturday and Sunday. I attended the hearing under the effects of medication in the hospital because of the panic attack I suffered from being left without support. They didn't notice the lack of payment on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, or even Friday morning. They intentionally abandoned the case in the afternoon. Please, I have enough evidence to prove that the case was lost due to their poor work.

Furthermore, not only did they force me to sign documents without explanation, but now they are threatening me to remove the post under the pretext of defamation. Things are going very well for us in court.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are deeply sorry to read about your experience and appreciate you sharing your concerns, although your allegations are completely false. At our firm, we strive to maintain transparency and integrity in all our cases, and we consider our clients' feedback with the utmost seriousness.

We would like to clarify some important points without disclosing specific details for confidentiality reasons. You retained our services in November 2021 for your divorce proceedings. During our time representing you, we worked diligently on your case, including filing all necessary documents in accordance with court deadlines. In July 2022, with your signed consent, we ceased representing you due to difficulties in continuing payments for our services.

It is important to note that the accusations in your review are serious and defamatory. We assure you that at no time did we force anyone to sign documents without their consent or withhold evidence; this is entirely false.

Since your review, we have been monitoring the progress of your case and understand your frustration that, three years later and with alternative legal representation, you still haven't reached a settlement. However, defaming the person who tried to help you three years ago is not the right approach.

We wish you the best of luck with your case.

reviews.text:
🌟 The Power of Choosing Who Surrounds You
Over time, I’ve come to realize something simple, but truly life-changing:
We have the power to choose who we allow into our lives. The success I’ve achieved and the peace I feel today are deeply rooted in surrounding myself with people who genuinely lift me up; Those who support, encourage, guide, and help me grow. These are the people who make life safer, more grounded, and far more meaningful.
⚖️ My Attorney & Friend of 40 years — Nelson Peña
Recently, after a serious vehicle accident that left me injured, I turned to Nelson and his team at The Nelson Peña Law Firm. They not only provided expert legal guidance but also genuine compassion and emotional support every step of the way. Knowing I had someone reliable, caring, and deeply committed by my side made all the difference. Nelson isn’t just my attorney; he’s a friend for life. He knows me and my family inside out. He’s the kind of person who shows up when it matters most. His entire team treats clients the same way, with respect, warmth, and care, like old friends who know exactly when to help.
My Spouse of 35 years is one of life’s greatest blessings. Sharing your journey with someone you love wholeheartedly transforms every experience. Marriage isn’t always easy, but together it’s worth every challenge, because love, patience, and partnership make life truly beautiful.
🔧 My Mechanic — My Son
If you own a car, you know how important it is to have someone dependable and honest to keep it running smoothly. When that person happens to be your son, it’s more than peace of mind, it’s pride and love rolled into one. Watching him grow into someone trustworthy and skilled is one of my greatest joys.
🩺 My Primary Care Doctor of 20 years A trusted guide on my health journey. Someone who truly knows me, my history, and my needs. In a world that moves too fast, having a doctor who listens and provides care that feels personal and genuine is a rare and grounding gift.
📊 My CPA of 20 years Not everyone finds joy in numbers, but thankfully, my CPA does! Having a wise, trustworthy advisor who helps me navigate finances, taxes, and long-term goals allows me to live with confidence and focus on what matters most.
Each of these incredible people plays a different role in my life, but they all share one thing in common: genuine care. They remind me that success and peace aren’t built alone, they’re built with the right people beside you. The ones who lift you up, stand with you, and help you grow. So today, I encourage you to take a moment to think about your circle.
Who are the people who make your life safer, brighter, and more meaningful?
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful and heartfelt message. We’re truly honored to have earned your trust over the years and to have been part of your journey through this challenging time. Your kind words mean a great deal to Nelson and our entire team — we’re grateful to call you both a client and a friend.

— The Nelson Peña Law Firm

Lux Orbis Legal is the bomb!!! And Attorney Raimundo is off the chain. He really came through for us when we needed it most. Back in December, my wife and I had loss at our property that we quickly wanted to resolve. We wanted to make repairs, but our priority was to make sure the property was safe. We were clueless about what to do next and were unsure if filing a claim was the way to go. We worried about whether it was even worth it, how much of a hassle it would be, and feared the insurance company might cancel our policy or raise our rates.

We consulted Raimundo, who patiently explained the process. After getting a better understanding of the claim process, we decided to move forward with him as our attorney.

He was constantly in communication with the insurance company, bombarding them with questions and pushing them to resolve our claim. Along the way, he kept us updated, explained possible outcomes for each step, and always shared the "why" behind every action. Even with the insurance company's constant delays, he kept at it. There were moments when we were ready to throw in the towel, but Raimundo pushed us to keep fighting.

After four months, our claim was finally settled thanks to Raimundo's determination and persistence. It's clear he genuinely cares about fighting for his clients and doing what's right. We can't thank him enough for all his help!

reviews.text: Words cannot fully capture the deep gratitude I feel for Gabrielle Pazos and her incredible paralegal Amelia Naranjo. Their unwavering responsiveness, lightning-fast action, and unmatched knowledge touched me profoundly. Gabrielle’s genuine willingness to be there—always accessible, always ready to answer my calls and texts—showed me she truly cares. She tirelessly stayed on top of everything, fighting for me with passion and dedication. If you’re seeking an injury lawyer who is truly committed, compassionate, and responsive, do not hesitate—choose her without a second thought. I can promise you, you will never regret it! I would choose her a thousand times over, and my heart is forever grateful.

When no other attorney was willing to take on my case due to its sensitive nature and the heavy litigation involved, Mr. Jimenez, Esq. stepped in without hesitation. I had already filed a restraining order on my own after my eldest son was hospitalized due to domestic abuse by his father. Mr. Jimenez not only took my case, he fought hard and won all three of my domestic violence injunctions, including a permanent one on my behalf.

He is honest, incredibly knowledgeable in family law, and remarkably diligent. He continues to represent me in ongoing litigation against my ex-husband, and I trust him fully with my case. I’m forever grateful for his support and legal expertise.

Good lawyers are hard to find, and Mr. Jimenez is absolutely one you want in your corner. I highly recommend him to anyone in need of strong, compassionate, and effective legal representation.

reviews.text: He's unprofessional. He asks for an advance payment to prepare a document, and then, after wasting your time without explanation, sends you to the secretary's office to tell you he can't do the job. He's extremely informal and lacks seriousness.
reviews.ownerResponse: I apologize for your negative experience.  The secretary made a mistake and accepted your payment over the phone to prepare a legal document without consulting me first.  She is not a lawyer and does not know whether we can prepare certain legal documents; I have had a discussion with her and it will not happen again.  After speaking to you over the phone and analyzing your case I realized that we were not able to help you with the document that you wanted us to prepare, this is why I instructed the secretary to tell you that we could take your case and to give you back your money immediately, which she did.  However, we are surprised that you are giving us such a bad review when we have never met in person, and you have never been our client, we just had a phone call conversation.  Our interaction was so minimal and you gave us such an negative review that you must have felt really badly to take your precious time to write a negative review.  I assure you that it was not our intention to hurt your feelings, I am sure that you were going through a very stressful situation and you were just seeking help.  I once heard someone say that "if I tell you something you may not remember, if I show you something you might remember, but the way I make you feel you will never forget."  Therefore, I apologize to you again for making you feel badly; it was not our intention to hurt you.  It was simply a misunderstanding and a mistake by my secretary.  If we could ever make it up to you please come visit us, our doors are open for you.
